purpose: Machine-readable CodeIR contract for eval and drift detection.

notes: Raw passthrough with entity boundary markers

field_semantics.C: Calls and semantic references — omitted if no calls
field_semantics.F: Behavioral flags (sorted, concatenated) — omitted if no flags
field_semantics.A: Assignment operation count — omitted if zero
field_semantics.B: Class base references — omitted if no bases

removed_fields.N: Name token removed in v0.2 — redundant with entity ID which already carries semantic abbreviation via compact_stem

Behavior.omission_rule: Fields with empty/zero values are omitted entirely rather than using placeholders

field_semantics.#DOMAIN: Uppercased module domain tag, no truncation (omitted when unknown)
field_semantics.#CATE: Uppercased first 4 chars of module category

internal_only.pattern_id: Computed and stored in ir_json for change detection, but omitted from text output (zero semantic signal at selection time)
